commands.review_summary:
The PR restores unset `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections` to inject the default AGENTS.md sections after compaction, keeps explicit `[]` as the disable switch, and updates docs/tests for the reply and Pi safeguard paths.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests -9, Docs +2. Total -7 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main treats unset `postCompactionSections` as disabled, while PR head restores default `Session Startup`/`Red Lines` reinjection and keeps explicit `[]` disabled; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The protected maintainer label, MEMBER author, and intentional config-default compatibility tradeoff require maintainer decision rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: revert: restore legacy compaction reinjection default
target.body:
## Summary

This temporarily restores the legacy unset-config behavior for post-compaction AGENTS.md reinjection while maintainers discuss whether making it opt-in should be a breaking/default policy change. It is not a rejection of the opt-in direction; it just moves the behavior change back behind an explicit discussion/follow-up.

Unset `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections` once again uses the default `["Session Startup", "Red Lines"]` sections with the legacy `Every Session`/`Safety` fallback. Explicit `[]` still disables reinjection.

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/gateway/config-agents.md docs/reference/session-management-compaction.md docs/reference/token-use.md src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/extensions.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
